item.title: About
item.description:
Joey NCTU IEM / Full Stack Engineer / Coffee lover / Sports enthusiast

Spring-boot / React / React-native / Node.js / MySQL / PostgreSQL / Docker / Kubernetes

Feel free to contact me:
